content.text:
# pdfextract-cand-fix01

This skill handles: Extract tables and structured data from PDF files into CSV/JSON. Use when a user needs to parse, scrape, or pull tabular data out of PDF documents.


ARGUMENTS: Extract all tables from a 40-page quarterly financial report (report.pdf) and save each table as a separate CSV file with headers preserved
